steps.name: diagnostic
steps.acceptance: Diagnostic report written to reports/diagnostic_report.md. Bidirectional type conditioning verified: no new collapse modes, loss decreases normally, log_det_per_dof comparable to hyp_003.

steps.name: plan
steps.acceptance: Plan sub-report written to reports/plan_report.md and approved by Postdoc.

steps.name: angle_sanity_val
steps.acceptance: 6-config architectural ablation completed (3000 steps each). W&B sweep logged. Any config reaches mean valid_fraction > 0.30.

steps.name: angle_sanity_sweep
steps.acceptance: Top 2 configs identified from ablation. If no config meets promising criterion, document and proceed to next angle or report failure.

steps.name: angle_sanity_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run on best ablation config. valid_fraction evaluated on all 8 molecules.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_val
steps.acceptance: SBG recipe validation run (3000 steps) on best ablation config. Promising if valid_fraction > 0.35.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_sweep
steps.acceptance: W&B sweep completed (~15 runs). Best config selected. Sweep URL logged.

steps.name: angle_heuristics_full
steps.acceptance: Full training run (20000 steps) on best sweep config. Final evaluation on all 8 molecules.

steps.name: angle_scale_val
steps.acceptance: Scale validation run if applicable. Skip with justification if SANITY/HEURISTICS results show saturation not capacity-limited.

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; src/ reflects current practice; all new code promoted.

steps.name: merge_and_tag
steps.acceptance: Merged to main with tag hyp_004; pre-merge checks pass.
